description: Rust desktop MPC2000-inspired pad sampler with 4x4 grid, audio playback, recording, and loop sequencing

userStories.title: Project scaffolding and dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Rust project initialized with the correct dependencies so that all subsequent stories have a working build foundation.
acceptanceCriteria: Cargo.toml includes egui (eframe), rodio, and cpal as dependencies
main.rs creates a basic eframe/egui window that opens and closes cleanly
cargo build succeeds with no errors
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 4x4 pad grid UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a 4x4 grid of 16 labeled pads so that I have a visual interface to interact with.
acceptanceCriteria: 16 pads rendered in a 4-column grid layout
Each pad is visually distinct (border, background color, label)
Pads are numbered or labeled 1-16 in row-major order
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Audio playback engine
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a rodio-based audio engine that can load PCM/WAV audio into memory and play it back on demand.
acceptanceCriteria: AudioEngine struct wraps a rodio OutputStream and Sink pool
play_sample(data: Arc<Vec<u8>>) method plays audio immediately
Multiple simultaneous sounds play without blocking (polyphony)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Sample assignment and pad triggering
userStories.description: As a user, I want to load audio files onto pads and trigger them by clicking so that I can play sounds.
acceptanceCriteria: Each pad slot holds an optional Arc<Vec<u8>> audio buffer
Clicking a pad with an assigned sample plays it immediately
Clicking a pad with no sample does nothing
Clicking an already-playing pad restarts the sample from the beginning
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Pad active state visual feedback
userStories.description: As a user, I want pads to change color while their sample is playing so that I can see which pads are active.
acceptanceCriteria: Pads show a distinct highlight color while their sample is playing
Pads return to default color when sample finishes or is stopped
Visual state updates within one frame of triggering
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Stop All button and Space key shortcut
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Stop All button that immediately silences every playing sample so that I can cut all sound at once.
acceptanceCriteria: Stop All button is visible in the UI
Clicking Stop All stops all currently playing samples immediately
Pressing Space key also triggers Stop All
All pad active states reset when Stop All fires
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Keyboard controls for pad triggering
userStories.description: As a user, I want keyboard keys mapped to pads so that I can trigger sounds without using the mouse.
acceptanceCriteria: Keys Q W E R map to pads 1-4 (top row)
Keys A S D F map to pads 5-8
Keys Z X C V map to pads 9-12
Keys 1 2 3 4 map to pads 13-16 (bottom row)
Keyboard triggers behave identically to mouse clicks (play/retrigger)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Microphone audio recording via cpal
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a recording module that captures audio from the default input device and stores it as a PCM buffer.
acceptanceCriteria: RecordingEngine starts/stops mic capture via cpal
Captured audio is collected into a Vec<u8> WAV-encoded buffer
Recording state is exposed as a boolean flag readable from the UI thread
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Sample recording UI: record button, indicator, pad assignment
userStories.description: As a user, I want to record audio and assign it to a pad so that I can create my own samples.
acceptanceCriteria: Record button (or R key) starts recording; pressing again stops it
Blinking red indicator is visible in the UI while recording is active
After stopping recording, the next pad clicked receives the recorded audio buffer
Assigned pad label or color updates to indicate it has a sample
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Long-press pad to remove sample
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear a pad's sample by holding it for 3 seconds so that I can reassign or free up pads.
acceptanceCriteria: Holding down a pad for 3 seconds deletes its assigned sample
Visual feedback (e.g., progress fill or color shift) shown during hold
Releasing before 3 seconds cancels the clear
Cleared pad returns to empty state with no sample
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Loop/sequence recording engine
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a sequencer that records pad IDs and their relative timestamps during a recording session.
acceptanceCriteria: LoopRecorder struct records (pad_index, elapsed_ms) events
Start/stop controlled by L key and a UI button
Completed recordings stored in a Vec<Loop> with sequential names (loop#1, loop#2, ...)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Loop list sidebar UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a list of recorded loops in the sidebar so that I can select and manage them.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar panel displays all recorded loops by name (loop#1, loop#2, ...)
Clicking a loop in the list selects it as the active loop
Selected loop is visually highlighted
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Loop playback with original timing
userStories.description: As a user, I want to play back a selected loop so that it replays pad presses with the original timing.
acceptanceCriteria: P key and a Play button trigger playback of the selected loop
Pad presses fire at the recorded intervals (timing preserved)
Playback loops continuously until stopped
O key and a Stop button stops the selected loop
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Multiple simultaneous loop playback and independent stop
userStories.description: As a user, I want to play multiple loops at the same time and stop each one independently.
acceptanceCriteria: Multiple loops can run simultaneously without interfering
Each loop in the sidebar shows a playing indicator when active
Each loop has its own stop control in the list
Stopping one loop does not affect others
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
